meaning: glass (常饰有彩色条纹的)内尔西玻璃制品
examples: And while the problem is recurrent with every generation, some schools like the Nailsea school in southwestern England decided to eliminate the root of the problem altogether.
The sites in Nailsea are owned by the district council but are managed by the town council.
Last night we agreed to submit a written offer to North Somerset to acquire a 25-year lease on three of the car parks they own in Nailsea.
Riders set off from Queens Square in Bristol earlier and celebrations were held at the May Day celebrations at Millennium Park in Nailsea, where the route, of about nine miles, ends.
